Explore our [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools.

## [[link:/tools/51|VEED]]: The Reels Editing Powerhouse

[[link:/tools/51|VEED]] is packed with features perfect for Instagram Reels.

### VEED for Reels
- **Auto-captions**: Essential for Reels engagement
- **Trending templates**: Pre-made designs that work
- **Background removal**: Professional look anywhere
- **Audio cleaning**: Crystal clear sound

---

## [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]]: Turn Content into Reels

[[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] can turn your existing content into engaging Reels automatically.

### Pictory for Reels
- **Long to short**: Convert YouTube videos to Reels
- **AI highlights**: Find the best moments automatically
